# `runs` tools

## `runs.boot`

`partial`

Enqueue the boot job for an installed Run; poll jobs.* for completion. Operator only.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `run_id` | `string` | yes | The Run whose installed kernel to boot. |

## `runs.build`

`partial`

Enqueue the kernel build job for a Run; poll jobs.* for completion. Requires operator.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `run_id` | `string` | yes | The Run to build. |

## `runs.create`

`implemented`

Bind a Run to a ready System and Investigation in one transaction. Requires operator.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `build_profile` | `object` | yes | Build profile for the Run's kernel. |
| `investigation_id` | `string` | yes | Investigation to attach the Run to. |
| `system_id` | `string` | yes | Ready System (active Allocation) to bind. |

## `runs.get`

`implemented` · `read-only`

Render a Run; a failed Run maps to a failure envelope. Requires project membership.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `run_id` | `string` | yes | The Run to render. |

## `runs.install`

`partial`

Enqueue the install job for a built Run; poll jobs.* for completion. Operator only.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `run_id` | `string` | yes | The Run whose built kernel to install. |
